name: horizon
description: A beautiful, AI-powered new tab page. Cross-browser. Hermes-ready.

scripts.build:chrome: mkdir -p dist/chrome && cp -r manifest.json newtab icons background.js dist/chrome/ && cd dist/chrome && zip -r ../horizon-chrome.zip .
scripts.build:firefox: mkdir -p dist/firefox && cp -r manifest.json newtab icons background.js dist/firefox/ && cd dist/firefox && zip -r ../horizon-firefox.zip .
scripts.build: npm run build:chrome && npm run build:firefox
